summary: Campaign Unification feature tested - ALL 11 backend tests PASS and all frontend UI elements verified. Tag-Based and Date-Based campaign triggers are unified into a single workflow. Auto-enrollment for date-based campaigns is working.
critical_code_review_comments: campaigns.py line 592: date_type correctly added to allowed_fields for update
campaigns.py lines 926-930: check_date_triggers correctly uses both 'type' and 'date_type' fields for date campaign matching
contacts.py lines 70-130: _check_date_campaign_enrollment helper correctly maps contact date fields to campaign types
contacts.py line 171: _check_date_campaign_enrollment called on contact creation
contacts.py line 487: _check_date_campaign_enrollment called on contact update
models.py lines 415-453: Campaign and CampaignCreate models correctly include date_type field
new.tsx lines 513-541: Trigger type toggle (Tag-Based vs Date-Based) correctly implemented
new.tsx lines 563-605: Date type picker (Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date) with auto-enrollment info message
[id].tsx lines 455-481: Edit campaign trigger type toggle correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns and contacts created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign unification feature is fully tested. Backend supports both tag-based (type='custom', trigger_tag='xyz') and date-based (type='birthday/anniversary/sold_date', date_type='birthday/anniversary/sold_date') campaigns. Frontend shows unified trigger type picker with Tag-Based and Date-Based options. Auto-enrollment works when contacts with date fields are created/updated.

features_verified.backend_contact_birthday_enrollment: PASS - Contact with birthday field triggers auto-enrollment check
features_verified.frontend_template_picker: PASS - /campaigns/new shows 6 prebuilt templates + Build From Scratch
features_verified.frontend_build_custom_button: PASS - Build Custom button navigates to campaign builder
features_verified.frontend_trigger_type_toggle: PASS - Tag-Based and Date-Based toggle visible in new campaign builder
features_verified.frontend_tag_based_picker: PASS - SmartTagPicker appears when Tag-Based selected
features_verified.frontend_date_based_options: PASS - Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date options appear when Date-Based selected
features_verified.frontend_auto_enrollment_message: PASS - Green info box shows auto-enrollment explanation when date type selected
features_verified.frontend_edit_trigger_toggle: PASS - Edit Campaign page shows Trigger Type toggle with Tag-Based/Date-Based
